title: Spaghetti Bolognese
steps: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add onion and cook for 5 minutes until softened.
Add garlic and cook for 1 more minute.
Add the beef mince and cook, breaking it up, until browned (about 8 minutes).
Pour in the red wine (if using) and cook for 2 minutes until mostly evaporated.
Stir in the crushed tomatoes, tomato paste, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer uncovered for 20–25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, cook spaghetti in salted boiling water according to package directions until al dente.
Drain spaghetti and serve topped with the Bolognese sauce and grated Parmesan.
